chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5640 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.3306/2025 2. For order on Misc. No.713/2025 3. For order on office objection 4. For order on CMA No.25686/2024 5. For hearing of main case 18.02.2025 Mr. Rashid Khan, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-5. In view of order dated 27.02.2023 passed in CP D 6944 of 2022, recourse has to be taken in first instance before the Grievance Commissioner and direct recourse to writ jurisdiction in such CNIC matters has been deprecated. In view hereof, petitioner is at liberty to approach the Grievance Commissioner and direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is misconceived. Petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
